HomePage.title: Discover and book unforgettable tours
HomePage.description: Handpicked destinations, transparent pricing, and instant booking.

Footer.tagline: Curated tours across Vietnam and beyond.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to continue.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: Join to book and manage your tours.
Auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.

mfa.title: Two-factor code
mfa.help: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

Auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a link to {email}. Click it to continue.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.linkInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.oauthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.mfaCodeInvalid: That code didn’t work. Check your authenticator app and try again.
errors.syncFailed: Signed in, but we couldn't load your profile. Retry.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Two-factor authentication
security.description: Add an extra verification step when signing in with your password.
security.enrollHelp: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
security.qrAlt: QR code for your authenticator app
security.removeHelp: Enter the current code from your authenticator app to confirm removal.
security.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fields.localeHelp: Used for account notifications. It does not change the language of this page.

validation.fullNameMax: Full name must be 120 characters or fewer.
validation.phoneLength: Phone must be between 6 and 20 characters.

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

form.title: Book this tour
form.totalNote: Final amount is confirmed by the server at checkout.
form.empty: No upcoming departures for this tour.

errors.nameMax: Contact name must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.phoneLength: Phone must be between 6 and 30 characters.
errors.requestsMax: Special requests must be 1000 characters or fewer.
errors.departureDeparted: This departure has already started. Pick another date.
errors.departureNotOpen: This departure is closed for booking. Pick another date.
errors.seatsNotAvailable: Not enough seats left for your group. Pick another date or reduce seats.
errors.notFound: This tour or departure is no longer available.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.paidBody: A confirmation email is on its way.
success.timeout: Your payment is still being processed. Check your account in a few minutes.
success.missingCode: Payment received. Your booking will appear in your account shortly.
success.expired: This checkout session expired before payment completed. Nothing was charged.

cancel.title: Payment not completed
cancel.body: Your booking was not paid and will be cancelled automatically in about 30 minutes. Nothing was charged.

list.title: My bookings
list.subtitle: Your trips and their status.
list.empty: You haven't booked any tours yet.

note.paid: This booking is confirmed. A confirmation email has been sent.
note.pending: This booking is awaiting payment confirmation.
note.cancelled: This booking was cancelled. Nothing was charged.
